title: Gentle Thai Chicken Curry
description: A mild and creamy Thai-inspired dish made with tender chicken and a blend of aromatic spices. Serve over steamed rice for a comforting meal.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the curry paste to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the fish sauce, sugar, and lime juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the curry sauce.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and stir in the coconut cream.
Serve the chicken and curry sauce over steamed jasmine rice.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or basil leaves, if desired.
